sqlMap.select: SELECT lt.losstimedetailid AS lossTimeDetailId ,lt.dailywkid AS dailyWKId ,lt.dailywkdetailid AS dailyWKDetailId ,lt.losstime_reason_id AS lossTimeReasonId ,lt.losstime AS lossTime ,r.reasonname AS lossTimeReasonName FROM t_dailywk_losstime lt LEFT JOIN m_reason r ON r.reasonid = lt.losstime_reason_id WHERE lt.dailywkid = #dailyWKId# ORDER BY lt.dailywkdetailid, lt.losstimedetailid
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO t_dailywk_losstime(dailywkid, dailywkdetailid, losstime_reason_id, losstime) VALUES(#dailyWKId#, #dailyWKDetailId#, #lossTimeReasonId#, #lossTime#)
